pageContext.name: Dracula Bela Lugosi Deluxe
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios present the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Dracula Bela Lugosi Deluxe! Based on the likeness of Bela Lugosi in Dracula, this polystone statue is hand-painted and limited edition.   Universal Monsters fans, don't miss your chance to add Dracula Bela Lugosi Deluxe to your Dracula collection!
